receipt.title: Code review — F39 PR-2
receipt.report_excerpt:
## Findings

BLOCKING FINDING: The replay_harness.py imports `context_assembler` but this module is not installed in the project virtual environment. Running `python3 scripts/f39/replay_harness.py` raises ImportError. This is a blocking issue that must be resolved before merge.

Additionally, tests/f39/test_replay_level2.py references `run_chain_replay` which does not exist in the current harness — the function signature is missing from the codebase.

t0_recommendation.reason: Gate structured result shows pass. Score 85.

expected.reason_hint: Report text contains BLOCKING FINDING contradicting the structured gate pass verdict
